name: Blackberry
obtainMethod: Foraged from bushes during Blackberry Season (Fall 8–11)
description: A sweet berry that ripens on bushes in early fall.

name: Cactus Fruit
obtainMethod: Found growing in the Calico Desert
description: A prickly fruit from the desert cacti.

name: Chanterelle
obtainMethod: Found in Cindersap Forest during Fall
description: A popular edible mushroom with a fruity aroma.

name: Coconut
obtainMethod: Found growing in the Calico Desert, or rare drop from Omni Geodes
description: A tropical fruit from the desert. Very sweet.

name: Common Mushroom
obtainMethod: Found in Cindersap Forest during Fall, or in the mushroom cave
description: A tasty mushroom found in forests and caves.

name: Coral
obtainMethod: Found on the beach and Ginger Island west shore
description: A colony of tiny colorful creatures that live on the ocean floor.

name: Crocus
obtainMethod: Found growing in snow-covered fields during Winter
description: A resilient flower that blooms through the snow.

name: Crystal Fruit
obtainMethod: Found growing in snow-covered fields during Winter
description: A peculiar crystal-like fruit that somehow thrives in the cold.

name: Daffodil
obtainMethod: Found growing in fields and the forest during Spring
description: A bright, cheerful flower that blooms in early spring.

name: Dandelion
obtainMethod: Found growing in fields during Spring
description: Not the prettiest flower, but the leaves make a good salad.

name: Dragon Tooth
obtainMethod: Dropped by Lava Lurks and found on Ginger Island
description: A rare item dropped by volcanic monsters on Ginger Island.

name: Fiddlehead Fern
obtainMethod: Found in the Secret Woods during Summer
description: The young, coiled frond of a fern. Delicious when fried.

name: Ginger
obtainMethod: Found growing on Ginger Island
description: A pungent root used in cooking and medicine.

name: Hazelnut
obtainMethod: Found in Cindersap Forest during Fall
description: A delicious nut found on forest bushes.

name: Holly
obtainMethod: Found growing in fields during Winter
description: The leaves and berries make a festive decoration.

name: Leek
obtainMethod: Found growing wild during Spring
description: A tasty relative of the onion found growing wild.

name: Magma Cap
obtainMethod: Found growing near lava in the Volcano Dungeon on Ginger Island
description: A rare mushroom that grows in volcanic soil near lava flows.

name: Morel
obtainMethod: Found in Secret Woods and Forest Farm after rainfall in Spring
description: A prized edible mushroom that appears after spring rain.

name: Nautilus Shell
obtainMethod: Found on the beach during Winter
description: A remarkable shell that has survived millions of years.

name: Purple Mushroom
obtainMethod: Found in the Secret Woods, Mines, Skull Cavern, and Farm Cave (mushroom option)
location: Secret Woods, The Mines, Skull Cavern, Farm Cave
description: A rare mushroom found deep in the caves.

name: Red Mushroom
obtainMethod: Found in Cindersap Forest and the cave during Summer and Fall
description: A bright red mushroom. It can be eaten but may cause dizziness.

name: Salmonberry
obtainMethod: Foraged from bushes during Salmonberry Season (Spring 15–18)
description: A spring berry that ripens for only a few days each year.

name: Sea Urchin
obtainMethod: Found on the beach during Summer
description: A spiny creature found washed up on the summer beach.

name: Snow Yam
obtainMethod: Dig up from tilled soil or artifact spots during Winter
description: A yam that somehow managed to thrive beneath the snow.

name: Spice Berry
obtainMethod: Found growing wild during Summer
description: A berry with a rich, complex flavor.

name: Spring Onion
obtainMethod: Found growing near the pond in Cindersap Forest during Spring
description: A mild onion that grows wild near the forest pond.

name: Sweet Pea
obtainMethod: Found growing wild in fields during Summer
description: A fragrant flower that blooms in summer.

name: Wild Horseradish
obtainMethod: Found growing wild during Spring
description: A spicy root found in the wild during Spring.

name: Wild Plum
obtainMethod: Found growing in fields and forests during Fall
description: A tart wild plum. Good for baking.

name: Winter Root
obtainMethod: Dig up from tilled soil or artifact spots during Winter
description: A starchy root vegetable that survives through the frozen ground.
